title: Sweet And Silky Australian Paprika Stir-fry
description: A one-pot bake-friendly dish featuring paprika, perfectly suited for a pescatarian diet, combining sweet and silky flavors in this simple yet delicious meal.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp paprika
ingredients.notes: smoked or sweet, depending on preference

instructions: In a large skillet or wok, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add mixed vegetables and potatoes to the skillet. Stir fry them for 5-7 minutes or until they start to brown slightly.
Stir in paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Serve hot as a side dish with steamed rice or quinoa.
